base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sky_tileset — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Sky/Cloud (Worlds 2/5/7) — cloud-platforms, flying-carpet, starry backdrop. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
